The '''Champion's sword''' was a weapon wielded by the [[Arena Champion]] of the people of [[Kerritamba Village]].

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Champion's sword appeared in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
